features: HARDWORKING SKINCARE: O’Keeffe’s Working Hands is a highly concentrated hand cream developed to hydrate and relieve dry skin to provide long-lasting moisturisation for even the most severe cases of dry, cracked hands.

WHY IT WORKS: The skin's natural barrier can be damaged, causing dry, cracked skin. O'Keeffe's products are specially formulated to create a protective barrier on the skin's surface that locks in moisture and keeps your skin hydrated.
WITH GLYCERIN: Our hand cream contains hardworking ingredients that lock moisture into the skin and helps create a protective barrier on the skin’s surface, such as Glycerin.
NON-GREASY: O’Keeffe’s has designed a hardworking hand care range that looks after your hands, all day and night. Our non-greasy hydrating formula works as hard as you do. A little goes a long way.

GUARANTEED RELIEF: We know you’ll love our products, but if you are dissatisfied for any reason, we will refund your purchase with a voucher of equivalent value (terms and conditions apply). See website for details.
description: Product Description O’Keeffe’s Working Hands is a concentrated hand cream that relieves, hydrates and helps repair extremely dry, cracked hands. It works by forming a protective layer on the skin’s surface, locking moisture in. The highly concentrated unique formula was developed to hydrate and replenish moisture levels in the skin, providing long-lasting results for even the most severe cases of dry, cracked hands. Non-greasy and unscented, the seriously hydrating formula works as hard as you do. Brand Story O'KEEFFE'S COMPANY HISTORY The roots of O'Keeffe's Company go back more than 20 years to an arid region on the California-Oregon border known as the Klamath Basin. Bill O'Keeffe was a rancher and diagnosed diabetic who loved his rigorous, physical work. The tough lifestyle, however, took its toll on his hands and feet. His daughter, Tara, seeing the pain caused by his chronically dry skin, was driven to find product that relieved her father’s severely dry, cracked skin. Applying her skills as a pharmacist, Tara and her father spent years creating and testing various formulations mixed in her kitchen, until, many years later, she developed the basic formula for what has become O'Keeffe's Working Hands and, eventually, O’Keeffe’s for Healthy Feet. Now, with the amazing quality of Bill and Tara O'Keeffe's formula, O’Keeffe’s Company is committed to carrying out their legacy—developing skin care solutions that work as hard as you do. O'Keeffe's Company is a family-owned business and is proud to support our workers, the backbone of every American community. In 2015, O’Keeffe’s expanded their product line to include Working Hands and Healthy Feet in tubes. These are designed for those that prefer tubes for ease of use, portability and cleanliness but still want the same results provided by O’Keeffe’s jars. In 2016, O’Keeffe’s expanded again – this time into the Lip Care and Body Lotion categories! Like all O’Keeffe’s products, NEW Lip Repair Lip Balm and Skin Repair Body Lotion are Guaranteed Hardworking Skincare. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Stearic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide, Dimethicone, Ceteth-10, Laureth-4, Paraffin, Hydroxypropyl Methylcellulose, Allantoin, Octyldodecyl stearate, Diazolidinyl Urea, Iodopropynyl, Butylcarbamate, Acrylates/ Acrylates/ Acrylamide Copolymer, Mineral Oil, Polysorbate 85 Directions For best results, apply a small pea size dab as needed throughout the day. Apply after hand-washing, after bathing and bed time. Start with a small amount- it's all that you need. Over application can lead to stickiness Safety Warning For external use only Manufacturer's Description O’Keeffe’s Working Hands is a concentrated, highly effective moisturiser that relieves extremely dry skin that frequently cracks. This unscented, non-greasy formula hydrates the skin – helping it retain moisture and making a difference you feel in days. It is safe for people with diabetes & eczema. O’Keeffe’s offers a tube version of our moisturizing hand cream. Our formula offers the same results O’Keeffe’s users know and expect in the convenience of a tube! Whether you prefer a tube or jar, O’Keeffe’s Working Hands Hand Cream comes in both forms to provide guaranteed relief. Box Contains 1 x O'Keeffe's Working Hands 96gm Hand Cream See more
